topic: Tenses Part 3 — Future Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

options: She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
I will have read this book by 7 pm.
I will be eating food at 8 pm.
I will eat rice tomorrow.
questions.answer: I will eat rice tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं कल चावल खाऊँगा।" = "I will eat rice tomorrow."

questions.sentence: I will be eating _____ at 8 pm.
options: to
been
eaten
food
questions.answer: food
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I will be eating food at 8 pm."

questions.sentence: I will have eaten food by 8 pm yesterday.
options: I will have eaten food by 8 pm yesterday.
I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
questions.answer: I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will have eaten food by 8 pm."

questions.hindi: 8 बजे तक मैं एक घंटे से खा रहा होऊँगा।
options: They will have done their homework by 3 pm.
He will be singing at 6 pm.
She will go to work tomorrow.
I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
questions.answer: I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "8 बजे तक मैं एक घंटे से खा रहा होऊँगा।" = "I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm."

options: been
sung
working
to
questions.answer: to
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "She will go to work tomorrow."

questions.sentence: She will be working at 5 pm yesterday.
options: She will be working at 5 pm yesterday.
She will be working at 5 pm.
questions.answer: She will be working at 5 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She will be working at 5 pm."

questions.hindi: 5 बजे तक वह काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी।
options: I will be reading at 7 pm.
I will eat rice tomorrow.
She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm.
She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
questions.answer: She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "5 बजे तक वह काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी।" = "She will have finished her work by 5 pm."

questions.sentence: She will have been working _____ two hours by 5 pm.
options: read
eating
to
for
questions.answer: for
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "She will have been working for two hours by 5 pm."

questions.sentence: They will go to school tomorrow yesterday.
options: They will go to school tomorrow yesterday.
They will go to school tomorrow.
questions.answer: They will go to school tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They will go to school tomorrow."

options: He will sing a song next week.
I will have been eating for an hour by 8 pm.
They will have done their homework by 3 pm.
They will be playing at 3 pm.
questions.answer: They will be playing at 3 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "3 बजे वे खेल रहे होंगे।" = "They will be playing at 3 pm."

questions.sentence: They will have done _____ homework by 3 pm.
options: singing
to
been
their
questions.answer: their
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "They will have done their homework by 3 pm."

questions.sentence: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm yesterday.
options: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm yesterday.
They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.
questions.answer: They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "They will have been playing for an hour by 3 pm."

options: He will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm.
She will have finished her work by 5 pm.
I will be reading at 7 pm.
I will exercise tomorrow morning.
questions.answer: I will exercise tomorrow morning.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं कल सुबह exercise करूँगा।" = "I will exercise tomorrow morning."

options: rice
been
read
reading
questions.answer: reading
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I will be reading at 7 pm."

questions.sentence: I will have read this book by 7 pm yesterday.
options: I will have read this book by 7 pm yesterday.
I will have read this book by 7 pm.
questions.answer: I will have read this book by 7 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will have read this book by 7 pm."

questions.hindi: 7 बजे तक मैं तीन घंटे से पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।
options: I will have eaten food by 8 pm.
They will be playing at 3 pm.
He will sing a song next week.
I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
questions.answer: I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "7 बजे तक मैं तीन घंटे से पढ़ रहा होऊँगा।" = "I will have been reading for three hours by 7 pm."

questions.sentence: He will sing _____ song next week.
options: been
done
singing
a
questions.answer: a
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "He will sing a song next week."

questions.sentence: He will be singing at 6 pm yesterday.
options: He will be singing at 6 pm yesterday.
He will be singing at 6 pm.
questions.answer: He will be singing at 6 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He will be singing at 6 pm."

questions.hindi: 6 बजे तक वह गाना गा चुका होगा।
options: She will be working at 5 pm.
I will exercise tomorrow morning.
He will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm.
He will have sung the song by 6 pm.
questions.answer: He will have sung the song by 6 pm.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "6 बजे तक वह गाना गा चुका होगा।" = "He will have sung the song by 6 pm."

questions.sentence: He will have been singing for _____ an hour by 6 pm.
options: finished

rice

questions.explanation: Full sentence: "He will have been singing for half an hour by 6 pm."
